violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Trays of chicken in the walk in cooler not covered.
Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. -Raw hamburger above cheese in the cold hold.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Clean plates and bowls in the kitchen are not inverted.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Ceiling areas in the kitchen have dust and grease.
Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. -Light shields are cracked and broken.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
